# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

Deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: python-flask-app
  labels:
    app: python-flask
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: python-flask
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: python-flask
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: flask-app-container
        image: your-repo/your-flask-app:latest  # Replace with your actual image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5000
        resources:
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
